name: Differ Group Holding Company Limited
summary: Differ Group Holding Company Limited, an investment holding company, trades in commodities in the People's Republic of China. The company provides financial related services, including finance lease services, express loan services, consultancy services, guarantee services, and security brokerage services. It is also involved in assets management business comprising property development and investment; distressed assets, equities investment, and fund management; and commodity trading business, as well as hotel and tourism services. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Xiamen, China.
